   352→      case "${z_imprint}" in
   353→        nsproto) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
   354→        srjcl)  butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
   355→        pluml)  butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
   356→        *)      buc_die "rbw-tn: unknown nameplate imprint '${z_imprint}' (expected: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)" ;;
   357→      esac
   358→      ;;
   359→    rbw-tap) butd_run_suite "access-probe" ;;
   360→    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
   361→    rbw-trc) butd_run_suite "regime-credentials" ;;
   362→    *)
   363→      if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
   364→        buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
   365→      fi
   366→      buc_info "Available test commands:"
   367→      buc_info "  rbw-ta   Run all suites"
   368→      buc_info "  rbw-ts   Run single suite (pass suite name)"
   369→      buc_info "  rbw-to   Run single test function (pass function name)"
   370→      buc_info "  rbw-tn   Run nameplate suite (imprint: nsproto, srjcl, pluml)"
   371→      buc_info "  rbw-tap  Run access-probe suite (OAuth/credential smoke test)"
   372→      buc_info "  rbw-trg  Run regime-smoke suite"
   373→      buc_info "  rbw-trc  Run regime-credentials suite"
   374→      return 0
   375→      ;;
   376→  esac
   377→}
   378→
   379→rbtb_main() {
   380→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   381→  shift || true
   382→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   383→  rbtb_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   384→}
   385→
   386→rbtb_main "$@"
   387→
   388→# eof
   389→

    20→

    22→
    23→ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/burd_regime.sh"
    29→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    30→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    31→source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    32→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/bupr_PresentationRegime.sh"
    33→
    34→######################################################################
    35→# Internal Functions
    36→
    37→######################################################################
    38→# Command Functions
    39→
    40→# Command: validate - enrollment-based validation report
    41→rbrr_validate() {
    42→  buc_doc_brief "Validate RBRR repo regime configuration via enrollment report"
    43→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    44→
    45→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    46→  buv_report RBRR "Repository Regime"
    47→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    48→}
    49→
    50→# Command: render - diagnostic display of all RBRR fields
    51→rbrr_render() {
    52→  buc_doc_brief "Display diagnostic view of RBRR repo regime configuration"
    53→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    54→
    55→  buv_render RBRR "RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo"
    56→}
    57→
    58→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR file
    59→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
    60→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
    61→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
    62→  buc_doc_brief "Resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR configuration file"
    63→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    64→
    65→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    66→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
    67→  zburd_sentinel
    68→
    69→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
    70→
    71→  local z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
    72→  local z_oras_token_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_token.json"
    73→  local z_oras_tags_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_tags.json"
    74→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_token_value.txt"
    75→  local z_oras_tag_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_tag.txt"
    76→  local z_oras_token_stderr="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_token_stderr.txt"
    77→  local z_oras_tags_stderr="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}oras_tags_stderr.txt"
    78→
    79→  # Discover latest oras stable version from GHCR API.
    80→  # oras doesn't publish a :latest tag, so we must find the newest semver release.
    81→  # GHCR requires a bearer token even for public images.
    82→  buc_step "Discovering latest oras version from GHCR (no :latest tag published)"
    83→
    84→  buc_log_args "Obtaining GHCR bearer token (anonymous, scoped to oras repo)"
    85→  curl -sS \
    86→    "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:oras-project/oras:pull&service=ghcr.io" \
    87→    -o "${z_oras_token_file}" 2>"${z_oras_token_stderr}" \
    88→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch GHCR bearer token — see ${z_oras_token_stderr}"
    89→
    90→  jq -r '.token // empty' "${z_oras_token_file}" > "${z_oras_token_value_file}" \
    91→    || buc_die "Failed to extract token from GHCR response"
    92→  local z_oras_token
    93→  z_oras_token=$(<"${z_oras_token_value_file}")
    94→  test -n "${z_oras_token}" || buc_die "GHCR returned empty bearer token"
    95→
    96→  buc_log_args "Fetching tag list using bearer token"
    97→  curl -sS \
    98→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_oras_token}" \
    99→    "https://ghcr.io/v2/oras-project/oras/tags/list?n=1000" \
   100→    -o "${z_oras_tags_file}" 2>"${z_oras_tags_stderr}" \
   101→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch oras tags from GHCR — see ${z_oras_tags_stderr}"
   102→
   103→  buc_log_args "Extracting newest stable semver tag"
   104→  # Filters to exact vN.N.N (no pre-release suffixes), sorts numerically, takes last
   105→  jq -r '
   106→    [.tags[] | select(test("^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))]
   107→    | map(ltrimstr("v") | split(".") | map(tonumber))
   108→    | sort_by(.[0], .[1], .[2])
   109→    | last
   110→    | "v\(.[0]).\(.[1]).\(.[2])"
   111→  ' "${z_oras_tags_file}" > "${z_oras_tag_file}" \
   112→    || buc_die "Failed to extract semver tag from oras tags response"
   113→  local z_oras_tag
   114→  z_oras_tag=$(<"${z_oras_tag_file}")
   115→  test -n "${z_oras_tag}" -a "${z_oras_tag}" != "null" \
   116→    || buc_die "No stable oras semver tag found in GHCR tag list"
   117→  buc_info "oras discovered tag: ${z_oras_tag}"
   118→
   119→  # Discover latest crane release from GitHub API.
   120→  # crane is distributed as a tarball (not a container image), so it needs
   121→  # its own freshening path separate from the image-pin loop below.
   122→  local z_crane_releases_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}crane_releases.json"
   123→  local z_crane_tag_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}crane_tag.txt"
   124→  local z_crane_old_url_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}crane_old_url.txt"
   125→  local z_crane_sed_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_SED_PREFIX}crane.sh"
   126→  local z_crane_stderr="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}crane_stderr.txt"
   127→
   128→  buc_step "Discovering latest crane release from GitHub"
   129→
   130→  curl -sS \
   131→    "https://api.github.com/repos/google/go-containerregistry/releases/latest" \
   132→    -o "${z_crane_releases_file}" 2>"${z_crane_stderr}" \
   133→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch crane releases from GitHub API — see ${z_crane_stderr}"
   134→
   135→  buc_log_args "Extracting tag from latest release"
   136→  jq -r '.tag_name // empty' "${z_crane_releases_file}" > "${z_crane_tag_file}" \
   137→    || buc_die "Failed to extract tag from crane releases response"
   138→  local z_crane_tag=$(<"${z_crane_tag_file}")
   139→  test -n "${z_crane_tag}" || buc_die "No tag found in crane latest release"
   140→  buc_info "crane discovered tag: ${z_crane_tag}"
   141→
   142→  local z_crane_url="https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/releases/download/${z_crane_tag}/go-containerregistry_Linux_x86_64.tar.gz"
   143→
   144→  buc_log_args "Reading current RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ from rbrr file"
   145→  grep "^RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'=' -f2- > "${z_crane_old_url_file}" \
   146→    || buc_die "No existing value for RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ in rbrr file"
   147→  local z_old_crane_url=$(<"${z_crane_old_url_file}")
   148→  test -n "${z_old_crane_url}" || buc_die "Empty RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ value in rbrr file"
   149→
   150→  if test "${z_old_crane_url}" = "${z_crane_url}"; then
   151→    buc_info "RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ: unchanged (${z_crane_tag})"
   152→  else
   153→    buc_info "RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ: -> ${z_crane_url}"
   154→    sed "s|^RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=.*|RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ=${z_crane_url}|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_crane_sed_file}" \
   155→      || buc_die "Failed to sed value for RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ"
   156→    mv "${z_crane_sed_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ in rbrr file"
   157→  fi
   158→
   159→  # Image specifications: VARNAME|BASE_IMAGE|TAG
   160→  # Most images use :latest which always points to newest version.
   161→  # oras uses discovered semver tag above (no :latest published).
   162→  local z_specs=(
   163→    "RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF|ghcr.io/oras-project/oras|${z_oras_tag}"
   164→    "RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud|latest"
   165→    "RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker|latest"
   166→    "RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/library/alpine|latest"
   167→    "RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/anchore/syft|latest"
   168→    "RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt|latest"
   169→  )
   170→
   171→  buc_step "Refreshing GCB tool image pins (vintage: ~${z_vintage})"
   172→
   173→  local z_updated=0
   174→  local z_unchanged=0
   175→
   176→  local z_spec=""
   177→  local z_varname=""
   178→  local z_image=""
   179→  local z_tag=""
   180→  local z_manifest_file=""
   181→  local z_digest_file=""
   182→  local z_oldref_file=""
   183→  local z_digest=""
   184→  local z_full_ref=""
   185→  local z_old_ref=""
   186→  # GCB runs on linux/amd64 — pin digests must match this platform
   187→  local z_pin_os="linux"
   188→  local z_pin_arch="amd64"
   189→  local z_sed_value_file=""
   190→  local z_sed_vintage_file=""
   191→  local z_inspect_stderr=""
   192→  local z_index=0
   193→  for z_spec in "${z_specs[@]}"; do
   194→    IFS='|' read -r z_varname z_image z_tag <<< "${z_spec}"
   195→
   196→    z_manifest_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}${z_index}_manifest.json"
   197→    z_digest_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}${z_index}_digest.txt"
   198→    z_oldref_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}${z_index}_oldref.txt"
   199→    z_sed_value_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_SED_PREFIX}${z_index}_value.sh"
   200→    z_sed_vintage_file="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_SED_PREFIX}${z_index}_vintage.sh"
   201→    z_inspect_stderr="${ZRBRR_REFRESH_PREFIX}${z_index}_inspect_stderr.txt"
   202→
   203→    buc_step "Inspecting ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   204→
   205→    docker manifest inspect --verbose "${z_image}:${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_file}" 2>"${z_inspect_stderr}" \
   206→      || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_image}:${z_tag} — see ${z_inspect_stderr}"
   207→
   208→    buc_log_args "Extracting ${z_pin_os}/${z_pin_arch} digest from manifest"
   209→    jq -r --arg os "${z_pin_os}" --arg arch "${z_pin_arch}" '
   210→      if type == "array" then
   211→        [.[] | select(.Descriptor.platform.architecture == $arch
   212→                  and .Descriptor.platform.os == $os)][0].Descriptor.digest
   213→      else
   214→        .Descriptor.digest
   215→      end' \
   216→      "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_digest_file}" \
   217→      || buc_die "Failed to extract digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   218→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   219→    test -n "${z_digest}" || buc_die "Empty digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   220→    z_full_ref="${z_image}@${z_digest}"
   221→
   222→    grep "^${z_varname}=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'"' -f2 > "${z_oldref_file}" \
   223→      || buc_die "No existing value for ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   224→    z_old_ref=$(<"${z_oldref_file}")
   225→
   226→    if test "${z_old_ref}" = "${z_full_ref}"; then
   227→      buc_info "${z_varname}: unchanged"
   228→      z_unchanged=$((z_unchanged + 1))
   229→    else
   230→      buc_info "${z_varname}: ${z_old_ref} -> ${z_full_ref}"
   231→
   232→      sed "s|^${z_varname}=.*|${z_varname}=\"${z_full_ref}\"|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_value_file}" \
   233→        || buc_die "Failed to sed value for ${z_varname}"
   234→      mv "${z_sed_value_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   235→
   236→      buc_log_args "Updating vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   237→      sed "/${z_varname}=/{
   238→        x
   239→        s|(~[^)]*)|(~${z_vintage})|
   240→        x
   241→      }" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_vintage_file}" \
   242→        || buc_die "Failed to update vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   243→      test -s "${z_sed_vintage_file}" || buc_die "Vintage sed produced empty output for ${z_varname}"
   244→      mv "${z_sed_vintage_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update vintage for ${z_varname}"
   245→
   246→      z_updated=$((z_updated + 1))
   247→    fi
   248→    z_index=$((z_index + 1))
   249→  done
   250→
   251→  buc_step "Refresh complete: ${z_updated} updated, ${z_unchanged} unchanged"
   252→}
   253→
   254→######################################################################
   255→# Furnish and Main
   256→
   257→zrbrr_furnish() {
   258→  zbuv_kindle
   259→  zburd_kindle
   260→  zburd_enforce
   261→  zrbcc_kindle
   262→
   263→  zrbrr_kindle
   264→  zrbrr_enforce
   265→
   266→  zbupr_kindle
   267→}
   268→
   269→buc_execute rbrr_ "Recipe Bottle Repository Regime" zrbrr_furnish "$@"
   270→
   271→# eof
   272→

     2→#

     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.

     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB CLI - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle command-line interface
    20→#
    21→# Commands:
    22→#   start           Start bottle service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   stop            Stop bottle service
    24→#   connect_sentry  Connect to sentry container
    25→#   connect_censer  Connect to censer container
    26→#   connect_bottle  Connect to bottle container
    27→#   observe         Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#   info            Show container names, network, and runtime
    29→#   validate        Validate configuration is complete
    30→
    31→set -euo pipefail
    32→
    33→ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Source all dependencies
    36→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    37→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    38→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
    39→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    40→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    41→source "${RBCC_rbrr_file}"
    42→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
    43→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
    44→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"
    45→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rboo_observe.sh"
    46→
    47→######################################################################
    48→# CLI Commands
    49→
    50→rbob_validate() {
    51→  zrbob_sentinel
    52→
    53→  buc_doc_brief "Validate that RBOB configuration is complete and runnable"
    54→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBOB Validate: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    57→
    58→  # All values computed at kindle - just verify they exist
    59→  test -n "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_RUNTIME not set"
    60→  test -n "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_SENTRY not set"
    61→  test -n "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_CENSER not set"
    62→  test -n "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_BOTTLE not set"
    63→  test -n "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_NETWORK not set"
    64→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    65→
    66→  buc_step "RBOB configuration valid"
    67→  echo "Moniker:   ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    68→  echo "Runtime:   ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}"
    69→  echo "Sentry:    ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
    70→  echo "Censer:    ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
    71→  echo "Bottle:    ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
    72→  echo "Network:   ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
    73→}
    74→
    75→rbob_info() {

   102→######################################################################

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBQ Qualify - Qualification orchestrator for tabtarget and colophon health
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBQ_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→source "${ZRBQ_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buq_qualify.sh"
    26→
    27→# Multiple inclusion detection
    28→test -z "${ZRBQ_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbq multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    29→ZRBQ_SOURCED=1
    30→
    31→######################################################################
    32→# Internal Functions (zrbq_*)
    33→
    34→zrbq_kindle() {
    35→  test -z "${ZRBQ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbq already kindled"
    36→
    37→  zbuz_sentinel
    38→  zrbz_sentinel
    39→  zrbcc_sentinel
    40→
    41→  test -n "${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURC_TABTARGET_DIR not set"
    42→  test -n "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR:-}"     || buc_die "BURC_TOOLS_DIR not set"
    43→
    44→  ZRBQ_TT_DIR="${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}"
    45→  ZRBQ_PROJECT_ROOT="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/.."
    46→  ZRBQ_RBW_DIR="${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/rbw"
    47→  ZRBQ_RBW_LAUNCHER=".buk/launcher.rbw_workbench.sh"
    48→
    49→  ZRBQ_KINDLED=1
    50→}
    51→
    52→zrbq_sentinel() {
    53→  test "${ZRBQ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbq not kindled - call zrbq_kindle first"
    54→}
    55→
    56→######################################################################
    57→# External Functions (rbq_*)
    58→
    59→rbq_qualify_colophons() {
    60→  zrbq_sentinel
    61→
    62→  buc_step "Qualifying RBW colophon registrations"
    63→
    64→  local z_fail_files=()
    65→  local z_fail_reasons=()
    66→  local z_checked=0
    67→
    68→  local z_file=""
    69→  for z_file in "${ZRBQ_TT_DIR}"/*.sh; do
    70→    test -e "${z_file}" || continue
    71→
    72→    local z_basename="${z_file##*/}"
    73→
    74→    # Load file lines (load-then-iterate)
    75→    local z_lines=()
    76→    local z_line=""
    77→    while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    78→      z_lines+=("${z_line}")
    79→    done < "${z_file}"
    80→
    81→    # Only check tabtargets using the RBW workbench launcher
    82→    local z_is_rbw=0
    83→    if (( ${#z_lines[@]} > 1 )); then
    84→      case "${z_lines[1]}" in
    85→        *"${ZRBQ_RBW_LAUNCHER}"*) z_is_rbw=1 ;;
    86→      esac
    87→    fi
    88→    test "${z_is_rbw}" = "1" || continue
    89→
    90→    z_checked=$((z_checked + 1))
    91→
    92→    # Extract colophon from filename (everything before first delimiter)
    93→    local z_colophon="${z_basename%%.*}"
    94→
    95→    # Check colophon exists in z_buz_colophon_roll registry
    96→    local z_found=0
    97→    local z_i=0
    98→    for z_i in "${!z_buz_colophon_roll[@]}"; do
    99→      test "${z_buz_colophon_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_colophon}" || continue
   100→      z_found=1
   101→
   102→      # Verify module file exists
   103→      local z_module="${z_buz_module_roll[$z_i]}"
   104→      test -f "${ZRBQ_RBW_DIR}/${z_module}" || {
   105→        z_fail_files+=("${z_basename}")
   106→        z_fail_reasons+=("module not found: ${z_module}")
   107→      }
   108→      break
   109→    done
   110→
   111→    test "${z_found}" = "1" || {
   112→      z_fail_files+=("${z_basename}")
   113→      z_fail_reasons+=("colophon '${z_colophon}' not registered in rbz_zipper")
   114→    }
   115→  done
   116→
   117→  buc_log_args "Checked ${z_checked} RBW tabtargets"
   118→
   119→  if (( ${#z_fail_files[@]} )); then
   120→    local z_j=0
   121→    for z_j in "${!z_fail_files[@]}"; do
   122→      buc_warn "${z_fail_files[$z_j]}: ${z_fail_reasons[$z_j]}"
   123→    done
   124→    buc_die "Colophon qualification failed: ${#z_fail_files[@]} of ${z_checked} tabtargets"
   125→  fi
   126→
   127→  buc_log_args "All ${z_checked} RBW colophons registered"
   128→}
   129→
   130→rbq_qualify_all() {
   131→  zrbq_sentinel
   132→
   133→  buc_step "Running full qualification"
   134→
   135→  buq_qualify_tabtargets "${ZRBQ_TT_DIR}" "${ZRBQ_PROJECT_ROOT}" \
   136→    "butctt.*.sh" \
   137→    # End of exempt list
   138→  rbq_qualify_colophons
   139→  rbrn_preflight
   140→
   141→  buc_step "Full qualification passed"
   142→}
   143→
   144→# eof
   145→

    23→# Get script directory

    43→# Simple routing function
    44→jjw_route() {
    45→  local z_command="$1"
    46→  shift
    47→
    48→  jjw_show "Routing command: ${z_command} with args: $*"
    49→
    50→  zburd_sentinel
    51→
    52→  jjw_show "BDU environment verified"
    53→
    54→  # Route based on command - only arcanum commands remain
    55→  # All jjw-* commands deprecated: use /jjc-* slash commands instead
    56→  case "${z_command}" in
    57→
    58→    # Arcanum commands (install/check/uninstall)
    59→    jja-c|jja-i|jja-u)
    60→      jjw_show "Delegating to arcanum: ${z_command}"

    62→      ;;

    66→      ;;
    67→  esac
    68→}

    71→jjw_main() {
    72→  local z_command="${1:-}"
    73→  shift || true
    74→
    75→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
    76→
    77→  jjw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
    78→}

    56→# Returns brand from installed jjc-notch.md, or empty if not installed

   464→jjw_install() {
   465→  buc_step "Clearing previous installation"
   466→  jjw_uninstall
   467→
   468→  buc_step "Computing brand from kit content"
   469→  local z_ledger_file="${ZJJW_SCRIPT_DIR}/jjl_ledger.json"
   470→  local z_temp_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_ledger_temp.json"
   471→
   472→  local z_hash
   473→  z_hash=$(zjjw_compute_source_hash)
   474→
   475→  local z_brand
   476→  z_brand=$(zjjw_lookup_brand_by_hash "${z_hash}")
   477→
   478→  if test -z "${z_brand}"; then
   479→    buc_step "Registering new ledger entry"
   480→    local z_max_version
   481→    z_max_version=$(jq 'map(.v) | max // 599' "${z_ledger_file}") || buc_die "Failed to compute max version"
   482→    z_brand=$((z_max_version + 1))
   483→
   484→    local z_commit
   485→    z_commit=$(git -C "${ZJJW_SCRIPT_DIR}" rev-parse --short HEAD) || buc_die "Failed to get git commit"
   486→
   487→    local z_date
   488→    z_date=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
   489→
   490→    jq --argjson v "${z_brand}" --arg h "${z_hash}" --arg c "${z_commit}" --arg d "${z_date}" \
   491→      '. + [{"v": $v, "hash": $h, "commit": $c, "date": $d}]' \
   492→      "${z_ledger_file}" > "${z_temp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ledger"
   493→    mv "${z_temp_file}" "${z_ledger_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write ledger file"
   494→  fi
   495→
   496→  buc_step "Creating directory structure"
   497→  mkdir -p ".claude/commands"
   498→  mkdir -p ".claude/jjm/current"
   499→  mkdir -p ".claude/jjm/retired"
   500→  test -f ".claude/jjm/jji_itch.md" || echo "# Itches" > ".claude/jjm/jji_itch.md"
   501→  test -f ".claude/jjm/jjz_scar.md" || echo "# Scars" > ".claude/jjm/jjz_scar.md"
   502→
   503→  buc_step "Emitting command files"
   504→  zjjw_emit_heat_saddle   > ".claude/commands/jjc-heat-saddle.md"
   505→  zjjw_emit_heat_retire   > ".claude/commands/jjc-heat-retire.md"
   506→  zjjw_emit_pace_new      > ".claude/commands/jjc-pace-new.md"
   507→  zjjw_emit_pace_arm      > ".claude/commands/jjc-pace-arm.md"
   508→  zjjw_emit_pace_fly      > ".claude/commands/jjc-pace-fly.md"
   509→  zjjw_emit_pace_wrap "${z_brand}" > ".claude/commands/jjc-pace-wrap.md"
   510→  zjjw_emit_itch_add      > ".claude/commands/jjc-itch-add.md"
   511→  zjjw_emit_notch_command "${z_brand}" > ".claude/commands/jjc-notch.md"
   512→
   513→  buc_step "Patching CLAUDE.md"
   514→  zjjw_emit_claudemd_section > "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_claudemd_section.md"
   515→  zjjw_patch_claudemd
   516→
   517→  buc_step "Adding JJM edit permissions to settings.local.json"
   518→  local z_settings_file=".claude/settings.local.json"
   519→  local z_temp_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_settings_temp.json"
   520→  # Install both permission variants - one should work regardless of Claude Code's expectations
   521→  local z_perm_old='Edit(.claude/jjm/**)'
   522→  local z_perm_new='Edit(/.claude/jjm/**)'
   523→
   524→  if ! test -f "${z_settings_file}"; then
   525→    echo '{"permissions":{"allow":["'"${z_perm_old}"'","'"${z_perm_new}"'"]}}' > "${z_settings_file}"
   526→  else
   527→    # Add both permissions if not already present
   528→    jq --arg p1 "${z_perm_old}" --arg p2 "${z_perm_new}" '
   529→      .permissions.allow = ((.permissions.allow // []) |
   530→        (if index($p1) then . else . + [$p1] end) |
   531→        (if index($p2) then . else . + [$p2] end))
   532→    ' "${z_settings_file}" > "${z_temp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to add permissions"
   533→    mv "${z_temp_file}" "${z_settings_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update settings file"
   534→  fi
   535→
   536→  buc_success "Job Jockey installed"
   537→  echo ""
   538→  echo "Restart Claude Code for new commands to become available."
   539→}

   541→jjw_uninstall() {
   542→  buc_step "Removing command files"
   543→  rm -f .claude/commands/jj*.md
   544→
   545→  buc_step "Removing agent files"
   546→  rm -f .claude/agents/jjsa-*.md
   547→
   548→  buc_step "Removing CLAUDE.md section"
   549→  zjjw_unpatch_claudemd

   551→  buc_step "Removing JJM edit permissions from settings.local.json"
   552→  local z_settings_file=".claude/settings.local.json"
   553→  local z_temp_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_settings_temp.json"
   554→
   555→  if test -f "${z_settings_file}"; then
   556→    # Remove both old and new permission variants for cross-version compatibility
   557→    jq '.permissions.allow = ((.permissions.allow // []) | map(select(. != "Edit(.claude/jjm/**)" and . != "Edit(/.claude/jjm/**)")))' "${z_settings_file}" > "${z_temp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to remove permission"
   558→    mv "${z_temp_file}" "${z_settings_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update settings file"
   559→  fi
   560→
   561→  buc_success "Job Jockey uninstalled (state preserved in .claude/jjm/)"

   564→jjw_check() {
   565→  local z_ledger_file="${ZJJW_SCRIPT_DIR}/jjl_ledger.json"
   566→
   567→  # Compute current source hash and look up in ledger
   568→  local z_hash

   570→

   581→    echo "Source brand: ${z_source_brand}"
   582→  else
   583→    echo "Source brand: (not registered)"
   584→  fi
   585→
   586→  if test -n "${z_installed_brand}"; then
   587→    echo "Installed brand: ${z_installed_brand}"

   592→  echo ""

   594→  jq -r '.[] | "  \(.v)  \(.date)  \(.hash)  \(.commit)"' "${z_ledger_file}"

   606→zjjw_patch_claudemd() {
   607→  local z_section_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_claudemd_section.md"
   608→  local z_prompt_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/jjw_patch_prompt.txt"
   609→
   610→  test -f "${z_section_file}" || buc_die "Section file not found: ${z_section_file}"
   611→
   612→  local z_section_content
   613→  z_section_content=$(<"${z_section_file}")
   614→  test -n "${z_section_content}" || buc_die "Section content is empty"
   615→
   616→  {
   617→    echo "In CLAUDE.md, find the '## Job Jockey Configuration' section."
   618→    echo "Replace everything from that header until the next '## ' header (or end of file) with this exact content:"
   619→    echo ""
   620→    echo "${z_section_content}"
   621→    echo ""
   622→    echo "If no such section exists, append at end of file."
   623→    echo "Preserve all other content exactly as-is."
   624→  } > "${z_prompt_file}"
   625→
   626→  local z_prompt
   627→  z_prompt=$(<"${z_prompt_file}")
   628→
   629→  claude --setting-sources user \
   630→    --allowedTools "Read,Edit,Write" \
   631→    -p "${z_prompt}" || buc_die "Claude CLI failed to patch CLAUDE.md"
   632→}
   633→
   634→zjjw_unpatch_claudemd() {
   635→  local z_prompt="In CLAUDE.md, find the '## Job Jockey Configuration' section. Remove everything from that header until the next '## ' header (or end of file). If no such section exists, do nothing. Preserve all other content exactly as-is."
   636→
   637→  claude --setting-sources user \
   638→    --allowedTools "Read,Edit,Write" \
   639→    -p "${z_prompt}" 2>/dev/null || true
   640→}
   641→
   642→######################################################################
   643→# Routing
   644→
   645→jjw_route() {
   646→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   647→  shift || true
   648→
   649→  case "${z_command}" in
   650→    jja-c) jjw_check ;;
   651→    jja-i) jjw_install ;;
   652→    jja-u) jjw_uninstall ;;
   653→    *)     buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}\nAvailable: jja-c (check), jja-i (install), jja-u (uninstall)" ;;
   654→  esac
   655→}
   656→
   657→jjw_main() {
   658→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   659→  shift || true
   660→
   661→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   662→
   663→  jjw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   664→}
   665→
   666→jjw_main "$@"

   355→    echo "---"
   356→    echo ""
   357→    echo "## Phase 1: Text Normalization"
   358→    echo ""
   359→    echo "**CRITICAL CONSTRAINT - Whitespace Only:**"
   360→    echo "This phase adjusts ONLY line breaks and blank lines. You must NOT change any words, punctuation, or sentence structure. The document content must be identical before and after - only the placement of newlines changes."
   361→    echo ""
   362→    echo "**DO NOT:**"
   363→    echo "- Reword or rephrase any text"
   364→    echo "- Split compound sentences into multiple sentences"
   365→    echo "- Join sentences together"
   366→    echo "- Add new text or delete existing text"
   367→    echo "- Change punctuation"
   368→    echo "- \"Improve\" clarity or readability through rewording"
   369→    echo "- Fix grammar or spelling (report issues but do not fix)"
   370→    echo ""
   371→    echo "**VERIFICATION**: After each edit, confirm the exact same characters exist - only newline positions may differ."
   372→    echo ""
   373→    echo "**Whitespace Rules to Apply:**"
   374→    echo ""
   375→    echo "1. **One sentence per line**: Break at EXISTING sentence boundaries (periods, question marks, exclamation points followed by space and capital letter). Do not create new sentences by restructuring."
   376→    echo ""
   377→    echo "2. **Linked terms isolated**: When a \`{term_reference}\` appears standalone in prose:"
   378→    echo "   - Line break before the term"
   379→    echo "   - Line break after the term"
   380→    echo "   - **Exception**: Terms at start of bullet items stay on the marker line (AsciiDoc requires \`* content\` syntax)"
   381→    echo "   - Example A (mid-sentence) - BEFORE:"
   382→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   383→    echo "     The system uses {excm_processor} to handle requests."
   384→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   385→    echo "   - Example A - AFTER:"
   386→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   387→    echo "     The system uses"
   388→    echo "     {excm_processor}"
   389→    echo "     to handle requests."
   390→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   391→    echo "   - Example B (start of sentence) - BEFORE:"
   392→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   393→    echo "     Previous sentence ends here."
   394→    echo "     {excm_term} starts a new sentence."
   395→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   396→    echo "   - Example B - AFTER:"
   397→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   398→    echo "     Previous sentence ends here."

   401→    echo "     \`\`\`"

   407→    echo "   - Connectives like \"and\" or \"or\" get their own line"
   408→    echo "   - Example:"
   409→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   410→    echo "     The interface supports"
   411→    echo "     {excm_drag},"
   412→    echo "     {excm_drop},"
   413→    echo "     and"
   414→    echo "     {excm_scroll}"
   415→    echo "     operations."
   416→    echo "     \`\`\`"
   417→    echo ""
   418→    echo "4. **Blank lines between paragraphs only**:"
   419→    echo "   - One blank line between paragraphs"
   420→    echo "   - No blank lines within paragraphs"
   421→    echo "   - No blank lines around list items (except before bulleted lists in Task Lens sections)"
   422→    echo "   - No blank lines around code blocks"
   423→    echo ""
   424→    echo "5. **Preserve code blocks**: Content inside \`----\` fences is opaque. Do not modify."
   425→    echo ""
   426→    echo "6. **Punctuation stays attached**: Periods, commas stay with their text, not on separate lines."
   427→    echo ""
   428→    echo "**Phase 1 Process:**"
   429→    echo "1. Read the target file(s)"
   430→    echo "2. **Search phase**: Use Grep to find all \`\\{[a-z_]+\\}\` patterns outside code blocks. This creates your checklist of terms to verify."

   433→    echo "   - Line break immediately after (or punctuation like \`,\` then line break)"
   434→    echo "   - Skip terms inside \`----\` code fences"
   435→    echo "4. Fix all violations found"
   436→    echo "5. **Verify**: Search again to confirm no inline terms remain (terms with text on same line before AND after)"
   437→    echo ""
   438→    echo "**Self-check**: Verify that removing all newlines from both versions produces identical text. If not, you have made unauthorized content changes - revert and try again."
   439→    echo ""
   440→    echo "---"
   441→    echo ""
   442→    echo "## Phase 2: Mapping Section Normalization"
   443→    echo ""
   444→    echo "**Scope**: The mapping section is delimited by \`// tag::mapping-section[]\` and \`// end::mapping-section[]\` markers, or from document start to first section heading if no markers."
   445→    echo ""
   446→    echo "**Category Group Definition**: A category group is a contiguous block of attribute references preceded by a category comment header (lines starting with \`//\` that describe the category)."
   447→    echo ""
   448→    echo "**Rules to Apply:**"
   449→    echo ""
   450→    echo "1. **Per-category alignment**: Within each category group, align all \`<<\` to the smallest multiple of 10 columns that accommodates the longest attribute name in that group."
   451→    echo "   - Measure from line start to \`<<\`"
   452→    echo "   - Column options: 30, 40, 50, 60..."
   453→    echo "   - Different category groups may have different alignment columns"
   454→    echo ""
   455→    echo "2. **Alphabetical ordering**: Within each category group, sort entries alphabetically by the display text (what appears after the comma in \`<<anchor,Display Text>>\`)."
   456→    echo ""
   457→    echo "3. **Preserve category headers**: Do not modify comment lines that serve as category group delimiters."
   458→    echo ""
   459→    echo "4. **Preserve section markers**: Keep \`// tag::mapping-section[]\` and \`// end::mapping-section[]\` exactly as they are."
   460→    echo ""
   461→    echo "5. **One entry per line**: Each \`:attribute:\` definition on its own line."
   462→    echo ""
   463→    echo "6. **Variant grouping**: Keep related variants together (base term, then _s, _p, _ed, _ing variants), sorted by the base term's display text."
   464→    echo ""
   465→    echo "**Example transformation:**"
   466→    echo ""
   467→    echo "BEFORE (misaligned, unsorted):"
   468→    echo "\`\`\`asciidoc"
   469→    echo "// Service Account Hierarchy"

   471→    echo ":rbtr_payor:                 <<rbtr_payor,Payor Role>>"
   472→    echo ":rbtr_mason:        <<rbtr_mason,Mason Role>>"

   474→    echo ""

   477→    echo "// Service Account Hierarchy"
   478→    echo ":rbtr_governor:           <<rbtr_governor,Governor Role>>"
   479→    echo ":rbtr_mason:              <<rbtr_mason,Mason Role>>"
   480→    echo ":rbtr_payor:              <<rbtr_payor,Payor Role>>"
   481→    echo "\`\`\`"
   482→    echo ""
   483→    echo "**Phase 2 Process:**"
   484→    echo "1. Locate the mapping section"
   485→    echo "2. Identify category groups (by comment headers)"
   486→    echo "3. For each category group:"
   487→    echo "   - Find the longest attribute name"
   488→    echo "   - Calculate alignment column (round up to next multiple of 10, minimum 30)"
   489→    echo "   - Sort entries by display text"
   490→    echo "   - Reformat with proper alignment"
   491→    echo "4. Write the updated mapping section"
   492→    echo ""
   493→    echo "---"
   494→    echo ""
   495→    echo "## Edit Tool Warning"
   496→    echo ""
   497→    echo "When using the Edit tool, \`{term}\` references must remain as single braces. Do NOT escape or double them. The Edit tool takes literal strings - write \`{mcm_term}\` not \`{{mcm_term}}\`."
   498→    echo ""
   499→    echo "---"
   500→    echo ""
   501→    echo "## Error Handling"

   503→    echo "- If file not found or not .adoc, report and stop."
   504→    echo "- If mapping section not found, skip Phase 2 but continue with Phase 1."
   505→    echo "- Report all issues encountered but continue processing where possible."
   506→  }
   507→}
   508→
   509→zcmw_emit_claudemd_section() {
   510→  {
   511→    echo "## Concept Model Kit Configuration"
   512→    echo ""
   513→    echo "Concept Model Kit (CMK) is installed for managing concept model documents."
   514→    echo ""

   529→    echo "- \`/cma-validate\` - Check links and annotations"

   531→    echo "- \`/cma-doctor\` - Validate installation"
   532→    echo ""
   533→    echo "**Subagents:**"

   535→    echo ""

   537→    echo ""
   538→    echo "**Important**: Restart Claude Code session after installation for new commands and subagents to become available."
   539→  }
   540→}

   543→# Main Commands
   544→
   545→cmw_install() {
   546→  buc_step "Clearing previous installation"
   547→  cmw_uninstall
   548→
   549→  buc_step "Creating directory structure"
   550→  mkdir -p ".claude/commands"
   551→  mkdir -p ".claude/agents"
   552→  mkdir -p "${ZCMW_LENSES_DIR}"
   553→
   554→  buc_step "Emitting command files"

   556→  zcmw_emit_render      > ".claude/commands/cma-render.md"
   557→  zcmw_emit_validate    > ".claude/commands/cma-validate.md"
   558→  zcmw_emit_prep_pr     > ".claude/commands/cma-prep-pr.md"
   559→  zcmw_emit_doctor      > ".claude/commands/cma-doctor.md"
   560→
   561→  buc_step "Emitting subagent files"
   562→  zcmw_emit_normalizer_agent > ".claude/agents/cmsa-normalizer.md"

   572→
   573→cmw_uninstall() {

   576→
   577→  buc_step "Removing subagent files"
   578→  rm -f .claude/agents/cmsa-*.md
   579→

   581→  zcmw_unpatch_claudemd
   582→
   583→  buc_success "Concept Model Kit uninstalled"
   584→}
   585→
   586→zcmw_patch_claudemd() {
   587→  local z_section_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/cmw_claudemd_section.md"
   588→  local z_prompt_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/cmw_patch_prompt.txt"
   589→
   590→  test -f "${z_section_file}" || buc_die "Section file not found: ${z_section_file}"
   591→
   592→  local z_section_content
   593→  z_section_content=$(<"${z_section_file}")
   594→  test -n "${z_section_content}" || buc_die "Section content is empty"
   595→
   596→  {
   597→    echo "In CLAUDE.md, find the '## Concept Model Kit Configuration' section."
   598→    echo "Replace everything from that header until the next '## ' header (or end of file) with this exact content:"
   599→    echo ""
   600→    echo "${z_section_content}"
   601→    echo ""
   602→    echo "If no such section exists, insert it before '## Current Context' if that section exists, otherwise append at end of file."
   603→    echo "Preserve all other content exactly as-is."
   604→  } > "${z_prompt_file}"
   605→
   606→  local z_prompt
   607→  z_prompt=$(<"${z_prompt_file}")
   608→
   609→  claude --setting-sources user \
   610→    --allowedTools "Read,Edit,Write" \
   611→    -p "${z_prompt}" || buc_die "Claude CLI failed to patch CLAUDE.md"
   612→}
   613→
   614→zcmw_unpatch_claudemd() {
   615→  local z_prompt="In CLAUDE.md, find the '## Concept Model Kit Configuration' section. Remove everything from that header until the next '## ' header (or end of file). If no such section exists, do nothing. Preserve all other content exactly as-is."
   616→
   617→  claude --setting-sources user \
   618→    --allowedTools "Read,Edit,Write" \
   619→    -p "${z_prompt}" 2>/dev/null || true
   620→}
   621→
   622→######################################################################
   623→# Routing
   624→
   625→cmw_route() {
   626→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   627→  shift || true
   628→
   629→  case "${z_command}" in
   630→    cmk-i) cmw_install ;;
   631→    cmk-u) cmw_uninstall ;;
   632→    *)     buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}\nAvailable: cmk-i (install), cmk-u (uninstall)" ;;
   633→  esac
   634→}
   635→
   636→cmw_main() {
   637→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   638→  shift || true
   639→
   640→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   641→
   642→  cmw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   643→}
   644→
   645→cmw_main "$@"

    32→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    33→
    34→# Verify dispatch completed
    35→zbuv_kindle
    36→zburd_kindle
    37→
    38→# Verbose output if BURE_VERBOSE is set
    39→vslw_show() {
    40→  test "${BURE_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "VSLWSHOW: $*"
    41→}
    42→
    43→# Load BURC configuration
    44→vslw_load_burc() {
    45→  local z_burc_file="${PWD}/.buk/burc.env"
    46→
    47→  test -f "${z_burc_file}" || buc_die "BURC file not found: ${z_burc_file}"
    48→
    49→  vslw_show "Loading BURC from: ${z_burc_file}"
    50→  # shellcheck disable=SC1090
    51→  source "${z_burc_file}"
    52→}
    53→
    54→# SlickEdit destination configuration
    55→VSLW_PROJECT_BASE_NAME="${PWD##*/}"
    56→VSLW_DEST_DIR="../_vs/${VSLW_PROJECT_BASE_NAME}"
    57→
    58→# Simple routing function
    59→vslw_route() {
    60→  local z_command="$1"
    61→  shift
    62→
    63→  vslw_show "Routing command: ${z_command} with args: $*"
    64→
    65→  zburd_sentinel
    66→
    67→  test -n "${VSLW_TEMPLATE_DIR:-}" || buc_die "VSLW_TEMPLATE_DIR not set - must be set by launcher"
    68→

    71→  # Load BURC configuration

    76→
    77→    # SlickEdit project installer
    78→    vslk-i)

    81→      local z_template_dir="${PWD}/${VSLW_TEMPLATE_DIR}"
    82→      local z_dest_dir="${PWD}/${VSLW_DEST_DIR}"
    83→
    84→      # Validate template directory exists
    85→      test -d "${z_template_dir}" || buc_die "Template directory not found: ${z_template_dir}"
    86→
    87→      # Step 1: Delete destination (fail if delete fails - catches held file handles)
    88→      if [ -d "${z_dest_dir}" ]; then
    89→        buc_step "Removing existing SlickEdit project directory"
    90→        vslw_show "Deleting: ${z_dest_dir}"
    91→        rm -rf "${z_dest_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to delete ${z_dest_dir} - is SlickEdit still open?"
    92→
    93→        # Verify deletion succeeded
    94→        test ! -d "${z_dest_dir}" || buc_die "Directory still exists after delete: ${z_dest_dir}"
    95→      fi
    96→
    97→      # Step 2: Create fresh destination directory
    98→      buc_step "Creating fresh SlickEdit project directory"
    99→      mkdir -p "${z_dest_dir}" || buc_die "Failed to create directory: ${z_dest_dir}"
   100→

   103→      cp "${z_template_dir}"/* "${z_dest_dir}/" || buc_die "Failed to copy templates"

   110→        sed -i '' "s/__VSLW_PROJECT_DIR__/${VSLW_PROJECT_BASE_NAME}/g" "${z_vpj_file}" \
   111→          || buc_die "Failed to substitute placeholder in ${z_vpj_file}"
   112→      done
   113→
   114→      # Report success
   115→      local z_file_count
   116→      z_file_count=$(ls -1 "${z_dest_dir}" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
   117→      buc_success "SlickEdit project created: ${z_dest_dir} (${z_file_count} files)"
   118→      ;;
   119→
   120→    # Unknown command
   121→    *)
   122→      buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}\nAvailable commands:\n  vslk-i  Install Visual SlickEdit Local Kit"
   123→      ;;
   124→  esac
   125→}
   126→
   127→vslw_main() {
   128→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   129→  shift || true
   130→
   131→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   132→
   133→  vslw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   134→}
